svg.text: Agent-Driven Workflows · Human-in-the-Loop · MCP Tools · Persistent Checkpointing
Interactive wizard workflow with AI-recommended protection policies, human approval, and persistent checkpointing
WORKFLOW DAG · 6 Agent-Driven Executors · HITL at Every Step
Select cloud platform — AWS · Azure · GCP · M365 · Google Workspace
⏸ HITL: User selects source platform tile
Configure credentials, discovery toggles — powered by CYERA
⏸ HITL: User configures org ID, import options
Scan & classify data via MCP — 247 objects, 12 apps, sensitivity map
⏸ HITL: User reviews discovery, selects capabilities
AI recommends SmartProtect rules, threat monitoring, resilience
3-2-1 resiliency plan, protection policy, cyber recoverability blueprints
🔌 MCP: 5 parallel calls (inventory, resiliency, policy, blueprints)
⏸ HITL: User reviews AI-generated resiliency plan
Final compliance review — approve creates policy, reject loops
🤖 AI reviews for compliance gaps & best-practice adherence
⏸ HITL: Admin approves or rejects with feedback
• Workflow survives server restarts — resume from last HITL pause
• Graceful degradation: Agent → MCP → Mock Data fallback chain
▼ Configuration Complete → Policy drives automated protection workflows ▼
Running Data Protection Jobs with Agentic Workflows
Autonomous agent workflows execute backup, monitoring, recovery, and compliance tasks driven by the approved policy
1. Policy Resolver — match workloads to rules
3. Transfer Agent — move data to vault (3-2-1)
Runs per schedule: Gold=4h · Silver=daily · Bronze=weekly
4. Alert Router — escalate to incident response
Runs: on-demand · DR drill schedule · incident trigger
Runs: daily audit · weekly reports · on policy change
❶ Admin authenticates → ❷ React SPA renders HITL screens → ❸ FastAPI manages sessions/SSE → ❹ MAF Runtime executes supersteps
❺ AI Agents + MCP generate recommendations → ❻ Admin approves policy → ❼ Policy drives automated workflows → ❽ Observability → agent improvement
Microsoft Agent Framework · Backup & Resiliency · AI-Powered Data Protection
Python · FastAPI · React · Vite · Azure AI Foundry · MCP (Streamable HTTP) · FileCheckpointStorage · WorkflowViz
